extract: Zacian (Japanese: ザシアン Zacian) is a Fairy-type Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Zacian has a second form activated by giving it a Rusted Sword to hold. Its original form, Hero of Many Battles, will then become the dual-type Fairy/Steel Crowned Sword. Zacian is the game mascot of Pokémon Sword, appearing on the game's boxart in its Crowned Sword form. Along with Zamazenta, Zacian is one of the legendary heroes, having played a role in stopping Eternatus during the Darkest Day.
